meta.title: Israel’s Economy after One Year of War
meta.description: Join Hudson’s Michael Doran for a discussion with Noach Hacker, the Israeli minister of economic affairs to the United States, on Israel’s economy since October 7, the status of the US-Israel relationship, and the challenges ahead.
